entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS093) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 1

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 1

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION RELECTS THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. SECTION B; PAGE B-3, TABLE B1.2-1-CHANGE THE PREFIX FOR LAND MOBILE RADIO SERVICES (OPTIONAL) FROM 059 TO 065; THUS MATCHING THE CORRECT PREFIX IN TABLE B.214.6.1-2 LMRS PRICING INSTRUCTIONS. 2. SECTION B; PAGE B-241. TABLE 6.5-3 REMOVE THE COLUMN TITLED "SERVICES AVAILABLE AT THE NON-DOMESTIC POP" AS THE COLUMN TITLED "SERVICE ACRYONYM:" IN TABLE B-6.5-8 IS A DUPLICATE OF THE DATA BEING REMOVED. 3. SECTION I. ADD FAR CLAUSE 52.209-9, UPDATES OF PUBLICLY AVAILABLE INFORMATION REGARDING RESPONSIBILITY MATTERS (JAN 2011) ALTERNATE I (JAN 2011).

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS094) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 1

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 1

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. TO ADD SEVEN (7) NEW CISCO SEDS TO SUPPORT NBIP-VPNS UNDER THE NETWORX ENTERPRISE CONTRACT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE0499.03E. 2. TO ADD ONE (1) NEW JUNIPER SED TO SUPPORT NBIP-VPNS UNDER THE NETWORX ENTERPRISE CONTRACT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE0512.01E. 3. TO ADD 20 MBPS COMMITMENT OPTION TO THE HI CAP FLEX (HCF) OPTION FOR IPS PORTS AT T3 SPEED UNDER THE NETWORX ENTERPRISE CONTRACT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE0513.01E. 4. TO ADD SIX (6) NEW CHARLES INDUSTRIES SEDS TO SUPPORT NBIP-VPNS UNDER THE NETWORX ENTERPRISE CONTRACT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE0514.01E. 5. TO REMOVE TWO (2) EDGEWATER NETWORKS SEDS UNDER THE NETWORX ENTERPRISE CONTRACT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE0518.01S.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS095) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 1

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 1

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
1. TO REDUCE NBIP-VPNS PRICING AND ADD NBIP-VPNS CLINS AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE0510.01E.
2. TO ADD WIRELINE SEDS TO SUPPORT NBIP-VPNS AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE0506.02E.
3. TO ADD WIRELINE SEDS TO SUPPORT NBIP-VPNS AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE0520.01E.
4. TO ADD WIRELINE SEDS TO SUPPORT NBIP-VPNS AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE0523.01E.
5. TO ADD WIRELINE SEDS TO SUPPORT PLS AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE0524.01E.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
1. TO ADD IPS FEATURE OF MTPS AS DESCRIBED IN AE0515.03E.
2. TO ADD ICB PRICING FOR MNS AS DESCRIBED IN AE0521.02E.
3. TO ADD WIRELINE SEDS TO SUPPORT NBIP-VPNS AS DESCRIBED IN AE0540.01E.
4. TO ADD WIRELINE SEDS TO SUPPORT NBIP-VPNS AS DESCRIBED IN AE0541.01E.

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS100) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 1

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 1

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1.TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) PRICING AND CASE NUMBER UNDER CLIN 0890955 FOR PREMISE WIRING AND CABLING PROVISIONING WORK AT 17 GOVERNMENT CONUS LOCATIONS UNDER THE NETWORX ENTERPRISE CONTRACT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE0528.01E. 2.TO ADD EIGHT (8) NEW (BAYTECH (2), CISCO(4), FORTINET(2)) SEDS TO SUPPORT NBIP-VPNS UNDER THE NETWORX ENTERPRISE CONTRACT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE0542.02E. 3.TO REDUCE PRICES ON CISCO / IRONPORT NETWORKS SERVICE ENABLING DEVICES (SEDS) TO SUPPORT NBIP-VPNS UNDER THE NETWORX ENTERPRISE CONTRACT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE0544.02P. 4.TO ADD TEN (10) NEW CISCO / IRONPORT SEDS TO SUPPORT NBIP-VPNS UNDER THE NETWORX ENTERPRISE CONTRACT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE0545.01E. 5.TO ADD NINE (9) NEW CISCO SEDS TO SUPPORT IPTELS UNDER THE NETWORX ENTERPRISE CONTRACT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE0549.01E. 6.TO ADD TWO (2) NEW CISCO SEDS TO SUPPORT NBIP-VPNS UNDER THE NETWORX ENTERPRISE CONTRACT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE0550.01E.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS101) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 1

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 1

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: TO ADD WIRELINE SEDS TO SUPPORT IPTELS AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE531.02E. TO ADD MNS TO SUPPORT TELEPRESENCE AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE538.02E. TO ADD MNS TO SUPPORT VOIP AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE546.02E. TO ADD ICB PRICING TO SUPPORT MNS VOIP AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE547.02E. TO ADD WIRELINE SEDS TO SUPPORT NBIP-VPNS AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE550.02E. TO ADD WIRELINES SEDS TO SUPPORT PLS AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE0554.01E. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL
